fullsiteGrayscale.description: When large incidents occur, enable a full-site grayscale mode to express memorial and respect.

cookieConsentBanner.description: Show a cookie consent banner to comply with privacy regulations.

enforceAgreement.description: Require users to agree to the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service before using the site.

maintainceModeWarning.description: Display a maintenance mode warning banner when the site is under maintenance.

announcement.description: Display an announcement banner for important updates or news.

messages.message: I've uptated my site's privacy policy and terms of service. By continuing to use the site, you agree to the updated terms.
